title.en: DERIVATIVES OF NATURAL MACROMOLECULAR COMPOUNDS (polysaccharides C08B; natural rubber C08C; natural resins or their derivatives C09F; bituminous materials C10)
Macromolecular products derived from proteins (food proteins A23; glue, gelatine C09H)
derived from horn, hoofs, hair, skin or leather
{Macromolecular compounds derived from lignin, e.g. tannins, humic acids}
Macromolecular compounds derived from lignocellulosic materials {(pretreatment thereof B27N)}
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass {, e.g. flours, kernels}
